coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in is mainly about whether Lin’s recent late-night pace reflects sustainable Head of Product scope or poor work distribution after the launches.
openingQuestion: What is still driving your time week to week now that the launches are behind you, and what feels like work only you should still be carrying?
listenFor: whether they name specific meetings, decisions, or stakeholders that are still consuming evenings
if they quickly frame the late nights as temporary but avoid giving a concrete example from this week
whether they point to one responsibility they hesitate to hand off and explain why
avoid: do not praise the feature launches in a way that normalizes three weeks of late nights as the expected standard
do not jump straight into solving resourcing or delegation before Lin has named what is actually filling their time now
goodOutcome: You and Lin have agreed which current Head of Product responsibilities require Lin’s direct ownership over the next two weeks and which one area should shift out of their hands.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one concrete example of work Lin personally carried during the launch push so you can test whether that kind of ownership is still necessary now.
